status_summary.current_stage: successful expansion phase entering structure-hardening phase

key_strengths: Complete internal workflow loop from intake to reporting and recovery
Desktop and release automation already in place
Operational safeguards such as auth, audit, recycle bin, and backup/restore exist
key_risks: Large orchestration hotspots in frontend and backend modules
Mixed schema migration responsibility between Alembic and runtime bootstrap
Validation depth does not yet match total feature breadth
Documentation lag behind implemented navigation changes
